chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-946 / 2013 Const. Petition No. D-3045 / 2014 and Const. Petition No. D-128 / 2015 ORDER WITH THE SIGNATURE OF THE JUDGE 1. For hearing of C.M.A. No. 22666/2015 (C.P. D-946/2013) 2. For hearing of C.M.A. No. 4332/2015 3. For hearing of Main Case. 4. For hearing of C.M.A. No. 22668/2015 (C.P. D-3045/2015) 5. For hearing of C.M.A. No. 31270/2014 6. For hearing of C.M.A. No. 15214/2014 7. For hearing of Main Case. 8. For hearing of C.M.A. No. 470/2015 (C.P. D-128/2015) 9. For hearing of Main Case. 03.11.2015 Mr. Abdul Sattar Pirzada, advocate alongwith Mr. Umair A. Kazi, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Abid S. Zuberi, advocate for respondent No. 3 in C.P. No. D-946/2013 Mr. Kashif Nazeer, advocate for respondent No. 3 in C.Ps. No. D-3045/15 and D-128/2015. Mr. Salman Talibuddin, Additional Attorney General for Pakistan. For the reasons to be recorded later, these petitions are dismissed. However, the operation of this decision shall not take its effect for a period of two weeks, whereafter the amount lying with the Nazir of this Court shall be released to the Customs Authorities. CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Zahid Baig
